rationale: The cited paper is used in the empirical methods section rather than as a generic background mention. The authors explicitly state they are drawing on Mizik (2010) when implementing their portfolio-matching robustness procedure, including SIC-based matching logic when exact industry matches are not available. This is a concrete methodological borrowing, even though it is not central to the paper's main theory development.
relation_description: The citing paper applies a portfolio construction/matching approach from Mizik (2010) in its robustness analyses of stock return effects. Specifically, it adopts SIC-based matching rules to form comparable high-versus-low marketing variable portfolios.
